changelog:
- fixed black buttons when opening profile from comments
accessibility fixes of:
- Instant View/browser, more IV blocks: blockquote, details, table, code...; links in talkback menu

- long press on send button opening options fix
- nearby venues labeled
- recording stories labels
- other minor unlabeled buttons
